runners.formComment: Missed the frame last start when seventh but had been in strong form prior to that, winning two on end before placing two back. Looks a leading contender on best and expected to bounce back.

runners.formComment: Was out of the placings at final run of last campaign, finishing fifth (25.56) at Sale before going for a three months spell. Others make more appeal.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Quick to begin; Lost ground on first turn.
Checked and lost ground on first turn.

runners.formComment: Missed the frame last time but was in the minors two on end prior to that, the most recent when second (23.22) over 400m at this track. Drawn a inside box but appears tested on latest effort.

runners.formComment: Solid performance after tracking the speed to win by 1.5 lengths at Ballarat over 390m (22.44) beating Rumbling Rose in T3 Grade 7 on April 6. Can keep things rolling.

runners.formComment: Modest effort last time out when fifth over 300m at Healesville. Will not find this easy. Not keen.

runners.formComment: Good effort to win last start by a neck over 400m at this track in a handy (23.16), beating Eloquent. Looks a solid contender.

runners.formComment: Was a winner three back at Ballarat then finished in the minors before missing the frame last time when fourth (25.65) at Ballarat. Rates strongly and can return to winning form.
